questions.q: Which name matches the object shown?

options.why: Reverses the endpoint and direction of the ray.
Treats the single arrow as arrows at both ends.
Ignores the arrow showing the object continues forever.

questions.q: Which ray starts at $Q$ and passes through $R$?

options.why: Places the through-point first instead of the endpoint.
Names a two-direction line instead of a one-direction ray.
Names a finite segment instead of a continuing ray.

questions.q: Which is a valid name for the marked angle?

options.why: Puts $C$ in the middle even though $B$ is the vertex.
Puts $A$ in the middle even though $B$ is the vertex.
Uses three diagram letters but does not centre the vertex.

questions.q: In $\angle LMN$, which point is the vertex?

options.why: Chooses the first arm point instead of the middle vertex.
Chooses the second arm point instead of the middle vertex.

questions.q: What do matching double arcs on two angles show?

options.why: Confuses curved angle arcs with straight interval tick marks.
Treats an angle mark as notation about ray direction.
Treats equal angle measures as the same physical point.
